excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that validation-length curriculum training is the same as the original train-short/test-long gate
a claim that output-path or curriculum diagnostics are positional-method promotion evidence
supported: A no-credential length-curriculum audit for the two-block learned pointer-generator path.
Evidence about whether adding the intermediate length-40 rows repairs held-out 48/64 retrieval generalization.

decision.claim_boundary: Adding length-40 rows preserves capacity but does not generalize all retrieval lanes.

model.curriculum_policy: original validation length 40 is included in training; held-out test remains lengths 48 and 64
model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, two q/k/v/o attention blocks, vocab output projection, positional scale, copy/vocab gate
model.value_output_mode: learned mixture of vocab softmax and copied prefix-token mass
